title: AI Risk Analysis Platform
summary: Multi-agent system for comprehensive risk assessment across 6 categories
description: Developed a sophisticated multi-agent AI platform at ScyAI that performs detailed risk assessments through specialized agents for temperature, water, wind, fire, solid mass, and chronic risks. Currently transitioning from API-based LLMs to self-hosted finetuned models.
features: Tool tokens for improved execution reliability

title: BR-V Transmission Optimizer
summary: AI-powered automatic transmission optimization using reinforcement learning
description: Created an RL-based system to optimize automatic transmission behavior in my Honda BR-V, incorporating realistic vehicle physics, Indian road data, and multiple algorithm comparisons.

title: BPTT Limitations Research
summary: Investigating fundamental limitations in Backpropagation Through Time
description: Systematic analysis of BPTT's 'Impossible Triangle' problem for recurrent networks, testing alternative gradient computation approaches including implicit differentiation and forward-mode autodiff.
